---
title: "POLSCI 300 Portfolio Projects"
output: html_document
#date: "2023-07-19"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Welcome!

to the host site for POLSCI 300 portfolio projects. We hope you will enjoy the exceptional work that University of Michigan students have done in this course.

Students have been creating these projects for two years now. Choose an iteration of the course below:

* [Spring 2025](https://polsci300.github.io/portfolioprojects/sp25)

* [Spring 2026](https://polsci300.github.io/portfolioprojects/sp26)
